value_chain_position: Enterprise search, observability and security analytics platform (Elastic) — software-infrastructure layer, providing the search and vector-database index layer that AI applications and security pipelines query at runtime.
relative_comps: ESTC's vector-search and hybrid-search capabilities make it a genuine AI-infrastructure participant — Elasticsearch is embedded as the retrieval layer in many RAG pipelines. 18% 3-year CAGR and 17% YoY growth are respectable but below hyperscaler-infrastructure leaders; 19% FCF margin and net cash are healthy. The open-source model creates a dual risk (AWS OpenSearch substitution) and moat (developer pull-through for enterprise upsell). Vs. Datadog and Dynatrace, ESTC competes on the search/observability overlap but is differentiated on vector and semantic search for AI applications.
